data.content:
Plan complete. Four child knots created:
1. knots-bb8d: Update skills prompts with delivery-target-explicit language (replace vague "Profile variant:" with {{ output }} template vars)
2. knots-9eb3: Wire compatibility workflow to render per-profile prompt variants (modify build_compatibility_prompts to produce per-profile rendered prompts)
3. knots-21d8: Align loom prompts with updated skills prompts (sync loom/knots_sdlc/prompts/*.md)
4. knots-495e: Add tests for profile-specific prompt delivery targets (assert no-PR profiles exclude PR artifacts, PR profiles require them)

Execution order: bb8d → 9eb3 → 21d8 → 495e (9eb3 depends on bb8d; 21d8 can parallel with 9eb3; 495e depends on all three).

Key architecture decision: leverage existing {{ output }} template rendering in compatibility workflow rather than introducing new infrastructure. Per-profile prompts stored in ProfileDefinition.action_prompts, picked up by poll_claim.rs:prompt_body_for_state().
